title: Composing emails in Outlook
excerpt: The default behaviour for clicking on an email Link in Monday CRM is opening up a popup window within the Monday app/website.  Is it possible to configure Monday so that clicking on an email link opens up a new email in …

posts.author: Areiel (Areiel Wolanow)
posts.cookedHtml: The default behaviour for clicking on an email Link in Monday CRM is opening up a popup window within the Monday app/website. Is it possible to configure Monday so that clicking on an email link opens up a new email in the Outlook desktop app instead?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Areiel ,
In Monday.com, the default behavior for clicking on an email link in the CRM opens up a popup window within the Monday app/website. However, it is not possible to configure Monday to directly open emails in the Outlook desktop app.
